features: Light & gentle lotion to help hydrate & plump skin
description: Product Description Moisturise & soften your skin with our Hyaluronic Body Lotion. Packed with moisture-locking Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycerin & Betaine, our light and gentle lotion helps deeply hydrate dry, tired skin. It's time to give your body the TLC it deserves! Ingredients Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum, Anthemis Nobilis (Chamomile) Flower Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Herb Extract, Raphanus Sativus (Radish) Leaf Extract, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Hull Extract, Glyceryl Stearate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Phenoxyethanol, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Laureth-7, Polyacrylamide, Parfum, Chlorphenesin, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool. Safety Warning FOR EXTERNAL USE ONLY See more
